nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of generic, unoriginal content
nodes.grounding_span: I love to word salad concepts and ideas into an ai and have it organize my thoughts

nodes.label: AI as scheduling assistant for complex logistics
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to handle complex scheduling and logistics
nodes.grounding_span: ai was able to stagger 6 perfomers, plus two performance areas, plus different costume change windows

nodes.label: AI writing style naturalness
nodes.grounding_span: ai tends to have a tone or a feel to it? The writing is distinct to me

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really trust ai to handle anything independently

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting due to corrections
nodes.grounding_span: Business tasks I try to finish as quickly as possible so it's usually a collaboration

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to me that my company/performances are unique and not generic

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saves so much time and makes it easy to get more work done

nodes.label: Professional competence and client satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: Clients like well written descriptions and set schedules

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I love how ai can point out options though when schedules get complicated

nodes.label: Frustration with AI when it deviates from tone
nodes.grounding_span: ai has so much recycled content

nodes.label: Distrust of AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really trust ai to handle anything independently

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I would LOVE to have an ai that could handle clients though but in my style of writing

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with diminishing returns awareness
nodes.grounding_span: I usually swap to a different ai if stuff gets too jumbled because it's easier to start over

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: For business stuff, Ai is wonderful... but when I'm printing backdrops or themed banners with quotes about the performers or performances, I always write them myself
